Hello! My name is Daiki Johnson, account daiki_johnson_9523, and I'm located at Denver, CO 80273. I'm reaching out because I recently received an air purifier, but unfortunately it hasn't been working well and I'd like to return it. I would appreciate a refund back to my original method of payment, if that's possible.

Thank you so much for your help with this — I really appreciate it!

Also, separately, I was wondering: would I be able to return a vacuum cleaner as well? I'm not sure yet if I'll need to, so I don't want to process anything right now — I just wanted to check if that would be an option. Thank you again!
